creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Well, it's something we'd like to direct issue management toward. We are preparing a set of recommended issue submission and management guidelines to be published soon.

Please note, this is not a requirement, but a recommendation. Nothing prevents committers from taking un-triaged issues with no clear approval from the maintainer. However, flagging maintainer approvals make issue tracking much more readable and easier.

Thanks for helping us out.
